name: Can't pass the cookies : r/youtubedl - Reddit

name: Why won't log in with yt-dlp on Windows with username and
snippet: Login with password is not supported for YouTube. Use --cookies-from-browser or --cookies for the authentication.

name: Allow passing cookies to yt-dlp for get around YouTube restrictions
snippet: I have discover a way that can effectively get around it, which is --cookies argument. Good news is yt-dlp itself supports accepting additional arguments.

name: How to use youtube-dl --cookies - Ask Different
snippet: The best way is to log in manually in my browser, obtain the authentication cookies somehow, and use the --cookies option.
